metadata.name: MedlinePlus-derived department routing rules
metadata.purpose: Seed rules for mapping symptoms/topics to Vietnamese clinical departments.
limitations: MedlinePlus groups are educational topic groups, not Vietnamese hospital departments.
Department mapping is heuristic and should be reviewed by a teacher/clinician.
keywords_vi_seed is curated for Vietnamese chat input; keywords_en_from_medlineplus is extracted from XML topics.

source.organization: MedlinePlus / U.S. National Library of Medicine
